_provenance.description: Hand-curated, wiki-verified gathered resources for the cost-layer gather channel. v1 covers the golden-set herb (Guam via Farming) only; bulk gather sourcing (Farming/Fishing/Mining/Woodcutting/Hunter tables) is a disclosed v1 follow-up. No live wiki fetch during build.
